messages.content:
Abdul Rauf is a skilled Python developer who specializes in building intelligent backend systems and AI-powered applications. He has a strong background in backend engineering and AI applications, with experience in a range of technologies including FastAPI, Django, REST APIs, LangChain, and LLM integration. 

Rauf is based in Lahore, Pakistan, and is open to new opportunities, both remote and on-site. With over 2 years of experience and more than 20 projects delivered, he has developed a strong skill set in frontend, backend, devops, and AI-related technologies.

If you'd like to learn more about Rauf's skills or experience, or get in touch with him, you can check out his contact information, which includes his email, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, GitHub, and Instagram profiles. He also has a resume/CV available for download.

messages.content: Hello. It's nice to meet you. I can help you learn more about Abdul Rauf, a developer who specializes in building intelligent backend systems and AI-powered applications. What would you like to know about him?
I want to get help about AI

Abdul Rauf has experience with AI technologies, including LangChain, OpenAI API, and Hugging Face. He has worked on projects such as Document Classification and Interview AI Assistance, which involve natural language processing and machine learning. 

What specific aspect of AI are you looking for help with? Are you interested in learning more about his projects, or do you have a particular question about AI technologies?

Abdul Rauf has over 10 years of experience in developing software applications, with a focus on building intelligent backend systems and AI-powered applications. He has worked on more than 20 projects, utilizing over 10 different technologies.

His experience spans across various industries, including healthcare, e-commerce, social networking, and more. Some notable projects he has worked on include oladoc, a healthcare platform, SeeBiz, a B2B wholesale marketplace, and Lango, a language access platform.

Rauf has also worked on AI-specific projects, such as Document Classification, which involves classifying uploaded documents into categories using machine learning and natural language processing. He has also developed an Interview AI Assistance tool, which allows visitors to explore a developer's portfolio through natural conversation.

In terms of specific technologies, Rauf has experience with Python, Django, FastAPI, and other backend frameworks, as well as AI libraries such as OpenAI and Hugging Face. He has also worked with various databases, including PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Redis.

Would you like to know more about a specific project or technology he has experience with?
